name: Chantilly National Golf & Country Club
about: Chantilly National Golf & Country Club is a premier private country club located in Northern Virginia, operating since 1959. The club is situated on 214 acres and features a championship golf course alongside extensive amenities including tennis courts, an Olympic swimming pool, and world-class dining facilities. It offers a comprehensive country club lifestyle experience with a strong emphasis on membership camaraderie and family-oriented activities. While primarily a traditional golf country club, it presents opportunities for golf simulation experiences through its various membership categories and golf-related programs.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to championship golf facilities and comprehensive amenities
XLife benefits providing exclusive travel and dining opportunities
Reduced membership pricing with special promotions available
Professional coaching and club fitting services

food_and_drink.notes: Premium dining and beverage services offered

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The club offers professional club fitting services and various membership categories that likely include golf equipment access, though specifics should be confirmed directly with the club.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The club provides world-class dining experiences on-site, and XLife benefits include exclusive dining opportunities. External food and drink policies would need to be confirmed with the club's management.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: As a traditional country club with a championship golf course, 18-hole playing times would follow standard golf course durations, typically 4-5 hours depending on pace of play.

faq.question: Is the club kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Chantilly National offers programming for all ages including 'Crush It! Youth Golf Lessons' and year-round family activities, making it a family-oriented club environment.
